scenarios.name: Auto agent on a coding prompt shows Coding in the trace, not Auto
Auto agent on a vague prompt falls back to Auto
Explicit coding agent shows Coding regardless of prompt content
User can create a skill with no signal keywords and it is applied broadly
scenarios.evidence: Reload preserved 2 skills; trace chips: Content, Broad guardrails

scenarios.name: User can create a skill with keywords legal, contract and it only applies when those words appear
scenarios.evidence: Non-keyword prompt omitted Legal review; keyword prompt trace chips: Auto, Broad guardrails, Legal review

scenarios.name: View prompt expands the assembled system prompt
scenarios.evidence: Expanded prompt length: 1725 chars; sections present: Additional constraints, Style reference from project history, Broad guardrails

scenarios.name: Repo context, custom rules, and style examples surface the expected chips when present
scenarios.evidence: Repo summary: 2 of 2 included 5,838 chars selected; trace chips: Auto, Broad guardrails, Repo context, Custom rules, Style examples

scenarios.name: Trace does not appear in compare mode
scenarios.evidence: Compare toolbar rendered and .pipeline-trace was absent.
